title: freziera incana
intro: Freziera incana, also known as the Frost Elm tree or the Silverbark, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves and bark of the plant have been used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating coughs. The plant's extracts have been used in traditional medicine to combat infections and promote overall well-being, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
